name: tpl-loan-credit-review
description: Bank Credit Analyst (銀行徵信專員) — credit bureau query, financial statement fetch, AI DSCR/ratio analysis and credit recommendation, conditional decline notification or credit memo drafting, LOS submission, confirmation. Replace bureau and LOS externalUrl with your bank's endpoints (e.g. Experian, Equifax, nCino, Salesforce Financial Services Cloud).

steps.notifyMsg: Credit application {{application_id}} recommended for DECLINE. Applicant: {{applicant_name}}. Loan amount: {{loan_amount}} ({{loan_purpose}}). Risk rating: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.risk_rating}}. DSCR: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.dscr_latest}}. Decline reason: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.decline_reason}}. Key concerns: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.key_concerns}}. Relationship manager notified — adverse action notice required within regulatory deadline.

Credit memo submitted to LOS for application {{application_id}} ({{applicant_name}}). Loan: {{loan_amount}} — {{loan_purpose}}. Recommendation: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.recommendation}}. Risk rating: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.risk_rating}}. DSCR: {{steps.assess-creditworthiness.output.dscr_latest}}. LOS reference: {{steps.submit-to-los.output.los_reference}}. Next step: {{steps.submit-to-los.output.next_action}}.
